entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, the crop studied for male fertility restoration

entities.name: MALE FERTILITY RESTORATION
entities.description: The ability of a plant to restore male fertility in a cytoplasmic male sterile line

entities.name: POLLEN SHEDDING
entities.description: The physical release of pollen from the anthers, used as a marker for male fertility

entities.name: SELFED SEED SET
entities.description: The production of seeds resulting from self-pollination

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The location of the testcross nursery where the hybrid was observed

entities.name: SELFING
entities.description: The process of self-pollinating plants to produce F2 progenies

entities.name: BACKCROSSING
entities.description: The process of crossing F1 plants back to the parent line 81A4 to produce BC1 progenies

entities.name: 81A4
entities.description: A specific pearl millet line used in the crosses

entities.name: 834B
entities.description: A specific pearl millet line that carries the gene for fertility restoration

entities.name: MALE STERILITY
entities.description: The condition where a plant cannot produce functional pollen

entities.name: SEGREGATION RATIO
entities.description: The proportion of offspring exhibiting different phenotypes in F2 and BC1 generations

entities.name: A4 CMS SYSTEM
entities.description: A specific cytoplasmic male sterility system in pearl millet

entities.name: DOMINANT GENE
entities.description: A single dominant gene carried by 834B that restores male fertility

relationships.description: is the location where the study was conducted
